Intro_Start.text: {setState:scenePrefix,Intro}{playVideo:intro}
{bg:JoyPolis}{showTextbox}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}October 17, 8:41 PM{nl}Joypolis

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {startBGM:investigation,false}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(My name is Phoenix Wright.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(I am a defense attorney at the Wright & Co. Law Offices.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(I received a request from the murder suspect, Mr. Will Powers,{nl}{p:300}a suspect in a murder case...)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(And came here,{p:300} to Joypolis.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(In order to clear Mr. Powers' suspicion, I must not overlook even the slightest detail.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(I'll write down all the [Information] I care about into the [Court Record].)

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Edgeworth["Normal"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{showTextbox}Detective Gumshoe. Please explain the summary of the incident.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}{fadeOutBg}(He is Miles Edgeworth. A prosecutor at the District Prosecutor's Office.)

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeInBg}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{p:200}{showTextbox}{blip:1,true}{color:white}The victim is Mr. Rando Daiba. He's the manager of Joypolis, pal.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The victim was put to sleep with sleeping pills, and stabbed in the neck from behind with a knife, pal.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The cause of death is blood loss, and the estimated time of death is between 7 PM and 8 PM.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The first discoverer is the suspect, Will Powers. He is a member of the Joypolis theater troupe.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: The suspect and the victim were apparently often fighting over payment, weren't they?

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: This time too, they got into a fight over that matter... After killing him, he reported it himself, is that it?

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: W-wait a minute. He is denying the crime.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: Detective Gumshoe. How did it lead to his arrest?

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: When the suspect visited the manager's office, the door was apparently locked, pal.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: When he entered the room with a spare key, the victim was apparently dead inside.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: But, there was an eyewitness who overturned that testimony...

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The victim's manager, Ms. Ini Miney.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: According to her testimony, before the incident, the suspect entered the manager's office together with the victim,

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: After that, it seems he left the manager's office alone.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: Following her testimony, we brought Mr. Powers in for questioning.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: Then, we found a small soy sauce dispenser in his changing room locker.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The exact same sleeping pills that put the victim to sleep were detected.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: When the body was discovered, the window of the manager's office was locked from the inside.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: If it is exactly as the suspect testified, the scene would have been a locked room.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: However, suicide is impossible. The cause of death is a stab wound to the back of the neck.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: If there is a culprit other than the suspect... It means the culprit accomplished a locked-room murder.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: In this situation... What do you plan to do, Wright?

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: Plan or no plan, I won't know until I try.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: I will definitely prove Mr. Powers' innocence!
{setState:intro_done,true}{hideTextbox}{stopBGM:true}{p:500}{hideCharacter}{fadeOutFg}{fadeBg:ナルホドMove}{playSound:jingle}{sectionEnd}{skip:0}
